title: Buttery Crunchy Cozy Cornmeal Crumble
description: A cozy Canadian dish featuring white cornmeal crumbled over a savory base with a touch of bhuna and garnished with nuts for crunchiness, vegan-friendly.

ingredients.name: Optional garnish: Fresh herbs like parsley, mint

instructions: In a mixing bowl, cream together the softened butter and cornmeal until well combined. Stir in salt, bhuna sauce, lemon juice, and cinnamon.
Fold in chopped nuts until evenly distributed throughout the mixture.
Transfer crumble onto an oven-safe dish or baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
If using fresh herbs, sprinkle them on top of the crumble before baking.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown and crispy. Let it cool slightly before serving.
